title: athenaea physocalycia
intro: Athenaea physocalycia, also known as the "Physocalycia Tree", is a species of flowering plant in the family Solanaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Athenaea physocalycia include treating fever, wounds, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as reducing inflammation and pain. Herbal preparations of Athenaea physocalycia can be made into teas, tinctures, or ointments, and are often used topically to treat skin conditions or taken orally to treat fever and other systemic issues.
